title: lesquerella ovalifolia subsp. alba
intro: Lesquerella ovalifolia subsp. alba, a subspecies of the Lesquerella ovalifolia plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the mustard family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to produce saponins, which have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lesquerella ovalifolia subsp. alba include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to support skin health and wound healing.
